title: Record-high Ahtna Shareholder Dividend Declared – For the first-time, distributions will be made from Ahtna’s Settlement Trust
summary: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Anchorage, Alaska – On November 6, 2018, in accordance with the Earnings Distribution Policy, the Trustees of Ahtna Hwt-anene (People’s) Trust formally declared a record-high shareholder distribution for 2018 of $10.27, or $1,027 per 100 shares.
